title: Dungeons and Bosses
description: Massive New Minecraft Bosses and Structures.
body:
Dungeons and Bosses

The modpack focuses on adventure (exploration, dungeons and exciting boss fights)
It offers new dimensions, many new mobs, many new bosses and don't forget all the new structures and special items!

The modpack should receive updates regularly and should always be available for the latest major version!
Old versions do NOT get a backport


Dimension: Overworld
The overworld in the modpack offers a lot of new content, including:
Lots of new animals, monster structures and even some new bosses! There is also a mod with what
archeology is more worthwhile.

Dimension: Nether
The Nether was of course also revised
new biomes, structures, epic bosses & loot

Dimension: End
Infos Coming SOon

Dimension: Aether
A true sky dimension floating high above the clouds. Explore heavenly islands, golden temples, and cloud pathways. But don’t be fooled by the beauty — deadly guardians like the Valkyrie Queen and the Sun Spirit stand between you and divine treasures. Only the worthy survive in this celestial battleground.

Dimension: Blue Skies
Venture into two mysterious worlds: Everbright, a bright and chilly land, and Everdawn, a shadowy realm bathed in crimson hues. While not true sky dimensions, both offer rich biomes, dangerous dungeons, and unique boss encounters. Conquer divine guardians and claim powerful loot in this RPG-style expansion of your world.
